title: howto recipe frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of every recipe. Required body sections (validated separately): Goal, Preconditions, Steps, Failure modes & recovery, Verification. Optional: Decision points, Variations, Safety & privacy.

name.description: kebab-case; must equal the filename without .md

domain.description: Top-level directory; must be a key in domains.json and match the file's location

subdomain.description: Required for domains that declare subdomains in domains.json (embodied, daily); must match the subdirectory

locale.description: First entry should be 'generic' unless the recipe is inherently locale-specific

risk.description: medium: money or identity involved; high: irreversible consequences possible

status.description: verified requires an agent-executability test (see CONTRIBUTING)

media.description: Optional multimodal assets. Each entry anchors an image/diagram/video to the recipe or a specific step. Files live in <domain>/assets/<recipe-name>/.

path.description: Path relative to the recipe's directory, e.g. assets/ride-a-subway/fare-gate.svg. Must exist.

step.description: Step number this asset illustrates. Omit for recipe-level assets (overview diagrams).

role.description: What the asset shows: how to perform the step, what success looks like, a schematic, a hazard, or the whole task

alt.description: Text description of the asset. Required: it is the fallback for text-only training and accessibility.

workspace.description: Embodied only: scene class for sim task compilation
